name: Todoist
description: Manage Todoist tasks: list, create, complete, and organize tasks with due dates and priorities

credentials_required.label: Todoist API Token
credentials_required.hint: Settings > Integrations > Developer in Todoist app

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks from Todoist, optionally filtered by project or filter expression

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in Todoist

author: freddy-schuetz
